src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Replace hardcoded URL path strings with constants from a configuration class to centralize API endpoint definitions.
Rename the service field from 'service' to 'productService' to improve code readability and explicitness.
Remove conditional category filtering logic from the controller, delegating it entirely to the service layer.
Introduce a new GET endpoint to retrieve product history by ID.
Add @Valid annotation to request body parameters to enable automatic bean validation.
Rename the update method's request body parameter from 'product' to 'updatedProduct' to distinguish it from the ID path variable.
Change the delete endpoint return type to ResponseEntity<Void> with 204 No Content status for better REST compliance.
Replace manual getters, setters, and constructors with Lombok annotations to reduce boilerplate code.
Add Jakarta Bean Validation annotations to enforce data integrity rules on entity fields.
Extend the Product entity from TenantEntity to support multi-tenancy requirements.
Add fields to track event sourcing metadata such as original product ID, event type, and timestamp.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: private Long originalProductId; private String eventType; private LocalDateTime eventTime;

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Introduce a specific constructor that initializes the event time to the current moment.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: public Product(String name, Double price) { ... this.eventTime = LocalDateTime.now(); }

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Refactor imports to use wildcard syntax for Jakarta Persistence and Validation packages.
Added a derived query method to find products by original product ID and tenant ID, ordered by event time.
Added a custom JPQL query to find current products for a tenant, filtering out non-CREATED events.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: @Query("SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.tenantId = :tenantId AND (p.eventType IS NULL OR p.eventType = 'CREATED')") List<Product> findCurrentProductsByTenant(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Added a custom JPQL query to find a product by ID and tenant ID, returning an Optional.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: @Query("SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.id = :id AND p.tenantId = :tenantId") Optional<Product> findByIdAndTenantId(@Param("id") Long id, @Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Added a custom JPQL query to find all products for a specific tenant ID.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: @Query("SELECT p FROM Product p WHERE p.tenantId = :tenantId") List<Product> findAllByTenantId(@Param("tenantId") String tenantId);

src/main/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Removed the obsolete method for finding products by category, likely replaced by tenant-specific logic.
Added necessary imports for Spring Data query annotations and Optional type.
Inject ProductProducer to enable publishing product events to Kafka.
Inject TenantProvider to support multi-tenancy context retrieval.
Import AppConstants for standardized event types and logging messages.
Import HistoryBuilder to facilitate creation of product history records.
Import ProductNotFoundException for explicit error handling.
Add @Transactional to ensure service methods run within a transaction scope.
Add SLF4J logger instance for service-level logging.
Update getAllProducts to filter by tenant ID instead of returning all products.
Update getProductById to filter by tenant ID and throw exception if not found.
Add getProductHistory to retrieve historical records for a product.
Update createProduct to set event metadata and publish to Kafka.
Update updateProduct to create history record, filter by tenant, and publish to Kafka.
Update deleteProduct to create history record, filter by tenant, and publish to Kafka.
Remove getProductsByCategory as it is replaced by tenant-aware queries.
Add processProductEvent to handle product events based on type using switch expression.
Add handleProductEventFromKafka to process incoming Kafka events with history tracking.
src/main/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: public void handleProductEventFromKafka(Product productEvent, boolean processEvent) { ... }

src/test/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Moved test class from controller package to root service package to align with new project structure.
Added EmbeddedKafka and MockBean for ProductProducer to support integration testing of Kafka interactions.
Activated specific test profile to ensure correct configuration loading during tests.
Added BeforeEach hook to clear database state before each test to ensure isolation.
Updated test requests to use the new API base path /api/products.
Added X-Tenant-Id header to test requests to support multi-tenancy requirements.
Replaced escaped JSON string with Java 15+ text blocks for improved readability.
Updated test payload and assertions to reflect new product data schema and values.
Migrate test setup from manual Mockito mocking to annotation-based injection for cleaner code.
src/test/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: Replaced `Mockito.mock()` and manual constructor injection with `@Mock`, `@InjectMocks`, and `MockitoAnnotations.openMocks(this)`.

src/test/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Update test cases to reflect the new multi-tenant architecture and Kafka integration.
src/test/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: Changed repository calls to include tenant IDs (e.g., `findCurrentProductsByTenant`) and added verifications for `ProductProducer`.

src/test/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Add new test cases for recently implemented service methods.
src/test/java/com/example/productservice.human_impl: Added tests for `getProductById`, `deleteProduct`, and exception handling scenarios like `testGetProductByIdThrowsExceptionWhenNotFound`.

src/test/java/com/example/productservice.general_idea: Correct the package declaration to match the file's directory structure.

pom.xml.general_idea: Bump the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Explicitly set maven compiler source and target properties to match the Java version property.
Define a specific version property for Lombok to manage its version centrally.
Explicitly declare the Maven Central repository in the repositories section.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for testing purposes.
Add Spring Kafka test dependency to support unit/integration testing of Kafka components.
Add Spring Boot starter for validation to enable Bean Validation support.
Update Lombok dependency to use the defined version property and change scope to provided.
Add MapStruct dependency for object mapping capabilities.
Add Flyway core dependency for database migration management.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag and set up annotation processor paths for Lombok and MapStruct.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Upgrade the Docker base image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to Eclipse Temurin 21 to align with the target JDK version.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Changed Hibernate DDL auto mode from update to validate to enforce schema consistency with migration scripts.
Enabled Flyway database migration tool to manage schema changes explicitly.
Configured Flyway to look for migration scripts in the classpath db/migration directory.
Configured Flyway to baseline existing database schema on first migration run.
